source_jobs.title: Are you ready for what's Next?
source_jobs.description:
<p>While we may not have an open role for you right now, we’d love to stay in touch! If you’re excited about the possibility of working with us in the future, feel free to drop your resume. We’ll keep it on file and reach out when we have a position that fits your background and experience.</p>
<p>We look forward to connecting when the time is right!&nbsp;</p>

source_jobs.title: Data Scientist
Director of Project Management

notes: Small job board with mixed roles, no explicit sponsorship or clearance info
